sources.label: BMKG / InaTEWS
sources.notes: Indonesia official meteorology, climatology, and geophysics agency. Primary source for Indonesian quake and tsunami information.

sources.label: BNPB
sources.notes: Indonesia national disaster management agency. Use for preparedness and disaster response education.

sources.label: BPBD Sulawesi Tengah
sources.notes: Central Sulawesi local disaster management authority. Use for local preparedness and response routing.

sources.label: USGS
sources.notes: United States Geological Survey earthquake feed. Used as a cross-check/fallback source, not as Indonesian public-warning authority.

sources.label: Palu Earthquake Alerts safety rules
sources.notes: Repository safety invariants derived from the project whitepaper and 2018 Palu lessons. Use only for framing, never as an official source.

rules.verifiedBeforePublish: A content decision may use reviewStatus=verified only after its content has been checked against the listed source IDs.
rules.officialRouting: Emergency and quake facts route to BMKG first. Preparedness education may also cite BNPB or BPBD Sulteng.
rules.noSourceGuessing: Do not invent source IDs. Add new sources here before using them in content decisions.
